stemHtml: During an approach where no track guidance is provided during a turn specified by the procedure, the protection area is (1) _____ and the minimum obstacle clearance (MOC) is provided in the (2) _____.

options.a: (1) primary and secondary; (2) total width of the area
options.b: (1) primary; (2) total width of the area
options.c: (1) primary and secondary; (2) primary area only
